creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text: "wpctl status" now shows "ALSA plugins (OSS by default)" instead of generic "PCM Sink" (or "PCM Source"). This helps to distinguish devices populated by pipewire-spa-oss from a single device created by ALSA=on that may simply pass to OSS or have its own routing/postprocessing e.g., uncomment "pcm.!default pcm.pulse" in ${LOCALBASE}/etc/asound.conf
